Part.Source:
Event Start
embeddedPage.Visible = 0 pro.Visible = 1 funcaoAutorizada.Visible = 0 Sucesso.Visible = 0 Falha.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon067_ModeloNFCe, &TCon067_ModeloNFCe)
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.CapaNFCe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.CapaNFCe.FilCod &NfeCod = &WizardData.CapaNFCe.NfeCod &SolCod = &WizardData.CapaNFCe.SolCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod
if NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando &Random = random()* 1000000000 &ProgressId = 'autoNFCe' + trim(Str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod))+ trim(str(&Random)) &ProgressId = &ProgressId.trim() scaProgressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) scaProgressBar1.Start()
RecepcaoNFe.Submit('RecepcaoNFe', &ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &SolCod) txtMsg.Caption = '' Else wwNotasNFce.Link() EndIF
Exit
When none wwNotasNFce.Link() EndFor
do 'impressaoDireta' btnCapaNfce.SetFocus()
EndEvent
Event Enter
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' Do 'FinishWizard' &WebSession.Remove(&WebSessionKey) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCapaNfce'
2
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpEmiteNFCe(!'TotaisNFCe', !'CapaNFCe', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoProdutos'
6
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpEmiteNFCe(!'TotaisNFCe', !'ProdutosNFCe', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRetransmitir'
//GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO ValidaSchemaNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.FilCod,&Mensagem) if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo65_4.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod)
&WizardData.CapaNFCe.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.CapaNFCe.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.CapaNFCe.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.CapaNFCe.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
wpEmiteNFCe(!'TransmitirNFCe', !'TransmitirNFCe', false) Else msg(&Mensagem) EndiF
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoConsultarNFCe'
//GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO GravaConsultaSEFAZ.call('', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod)
&WizardData.CapaNFCe.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.CapaNFCe.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.CapaNFCe.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.CapaNFCe.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
wpEmiteNFCe(!'TransmitirNFCe', !'TransmitirNFCe', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovaNFCe'
2
&WebSession.Remove(&WebSessionKey) wpEmiteNFCe.Link('', '', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoReimprimir'
8
&IsVisualiza = false do 'imprimenota'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoVisualizar'
&IsVisualiza = true do 'imprimenota'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &OqueFazer1 = &WizardData.TransmitirNFCe.OqueFazer1 &ImpressaoAutomatica = &WizardData.TransmitirNFCe.ImpressaoAutomatica
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.TransmitirNFCe.OqueFazer1 = &OqueFazer1 &WizardData.TransmitirNFCe.ImpressaoAutomatica = &ImpressaoAutomatica &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'FinishWizard'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete
pro.Visible = 0
For Each Order ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressId
// If not &TelaOrigem.IsEmpty() // BTnBtn1.Visible = 1 // EndIF
// BTnBtn2.Visible = 1
txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(210,130,0) txtMsg.Caption = ProgressLogXml.Trim()
if &ImpressaoAutomatica = 'S' &IsVisualiza = false do 'imprimenota' Else do 'imprimenotaManual' Endif Exit EndFor
EndEvent
Event &ImpressaoAutomatica.IsValid
&PadOBs = padl(trim(&OqueFazer1), 15, ' ') &PadOBs+= &ImpressaoAutomatica padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WPEMITENFCE_IMPRESSAODIRETA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PAdDtaMod)
EndEvent
Sub 'impressaoDireta'
btnVisualizar.Visible = 0 padraoUsuario.Call('L', 'WPEMITENFCE_IMPRESSAODIRETA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PAdDtaMod)
&Istem_CUPOM1 = RetornaTemImpressora.Udp(&Context.EmpCod, domTipoImpressora.CUPOM1, domTipoImpressora.CUPOM2) tbPedidoImpressaoDireta.Visible = 0 &OqueFazer1.clear()
if &Istem_CUPOM1 = true &ModeloPedido = 'IMPRESSÃO NFCE - TICKET' For Each Order EmpCod, EmpImpPC, EmpImpNom Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod where EmpImpTip = domTipoImpressora.CUPOM1 or EmpImpTip = domTipoImpressora.CUPOM2
&Mensagem = &ModeloPedido + '|' + EmpImpPC.Trim() + '|'+ EmpImpNom.Trim() &CodigoImpressora = '3B ' + PadL(str(EmpImpCod), 8, ' ') &OqueFazer1.AddItem(&CodigoImpressora, &Mensagem) EndFor tbPedidoImpressaoDireta.Visible = 1 btnVisualizar.Visible = 1 &OqueFazer1 = trim(Substr(&PadOBs, 1, 15)) Endif &Mensagem.SetEmpty()
&ImpressaoAutomatica = trim(Substr(&PadOBs, 16, 1))
EndSub
Sub 'imprimenota'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod
If not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada
funcaoAutorizada.Visible = 1 Sucesso.Visible = 1
GravarStatusIMpressao.Submit('GravarStatusIMpressao', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 0) txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(0,210,25) // BTnBtn3.Visible = 1 &Rando = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(serverTime()) &Documento = 'TICKET' + &Rando.Trim() //+ '.pdf'
if &IsVisualiza = true or &OqueFazer1.Count <= 0 do 'abreRCO' Else if &OqueFazer1.Count > 0 &PadOBs = padl(trim(&OqueFazer1), 15, ' ') &PadOBs+= &ImpressaoAutomatica padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WPEMITENFCE_IMPRESSAODIRETA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PAdDtaMod) &EmpImpCod1 = val(Substr(&OqueFazer1, 6, 8)) do CAse
Case Substr(&OqueFazer1, 1, 2) = '3B' // PEDIDO CUPOM DELIVERY prcGravaImpressao.Call(&EmpCod, &EmpImpCod1, 'RELJAS057', &FilCod, 0, &Context.PesCod, '', &NfeCod, &FiDtaIni)
Otherwise do 'abreRCO' EndCase Else do 'abreRCO' Endif Endif
btnNovaNFCe.SetFocus() Else Falha.Visible = 1 btnCapaNfce.SetFocus() EndIF
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'imprimenotaManual'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod
If not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada
funcaoAutorizada.Visible = 1 Sucesso.Visible = 1 &NfeStsImp = NfeStsImp GravarStatusIMpressao.Submit('GravarStatusIMpressao', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 0) txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(0,210,25) // BTnBtn3.Visible = 1 &Rando = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(serverTime()) &Documento = 'TICKET' + &Rando.Trim() //+ '.pdf'
if &NfeStsImp <> 'S' do 'abreRCO' // Else // if &OqueFazer1.Count > 0 // &PadOBs = padl(trim(&OqueFazer1), 15, ' ') // &PadOBs+= &ImpressaoAutomatica // padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WPEMITENFCE_IMPRESSAODIRETA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PAdDtaMod) // &EmpImpCod1 = val(Substr(&OqueFazer1, 6, 8)) // do CAse // // Case Substr(&OqueFazer1, 1, 2) = '3B' // PEDIDO CUPOM DELIVERY // prcGravaImpressao.Call(&EmpCod, &EmpImpCod1, 'RELJAS057', &FilCod, 0, &Context.PesCod, '', &NfeCod, &FiDtaIni) // // Otherwise // do 'abreRCO' // EndCase // Else // do 'abreRCO' // Endif Endif
btnNovaNFCe.SetFocus() Else Falha.Visible = 1 btnCapaNfce.SetFocus() EndIF
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'AbreRCO'
&domBrowserVersao = &Context.BrowserVersion //USE SEMPRE ASSIM PARA LOCALIZAR FUTURAMENTE ONDE USA A VERSAO DO BROWSER ATRAVES DO DOMINIO do Case case &TCon067_ModeloNFCe = 'B' and (&domBrowserVersao >= 50 and &domBrowserVersao <= 70) EmbeddedPage.Source = RELJAS057_ToPrintA5.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Documento)
case &TCon067_ModeloNFCe <> 'B' and (&domBrowserVersao >= 50 and &domBrowserVersao <= 70) EmbeddedPage.Source = RELJAS057_ToPrint.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Documento)
case &TCon067_ModeloNFCe = 'B' &Window.Url = RELJAS057_ToSreenA5.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Documento) &Window.Height = 800 &Window.Width = 800 &Window.Open()
Otherwise &Window.Url = RELJAS057_ToSreen.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Documento) &Window.Height = 800 &Window.Width = 800 &Window.Open() EndCase
EndSub
